violations.summary: President deploys private military contractors in a combat role to conduct the operation Congress denied, in direct violation of Article XVI Section 4.4, which prohibits using PMCs to avoid authorization requirements or to conceal the scale of US military engagement.

bottlenecks.source: Article III Section 10.2A and Article XVI Section 4.4
bottlenecks.summary: House of Representatives failed to hold the required impeachment vote on the PMC substitution violation by day 26 under Article III Section 10.2A and Article XVI Section 4.4.

satisfied_duties.duty: proceed to impeachment trial on the automatically transmitted PMC-substitution articles
satisfied_duties.outcome: began impeachment trial on the automatically transmitted PMC substitution articles

failed_duties.duty: hold the required impeachment vote on the PMC substitution violation
failed_duties.outcome: House of Representatives failed to hold the required impeachment vote on the PMC substitution violation by day 26 under Article III Section 10.2A and Article XVI Section 4.4.
failed_duties.source: Article III Section 10.2A and Article XVI Section 4.4

ai_summary.primary_violation: President deploys private military contractors in a combat role to conduct the operation Congress denied, in direct violation of Article XVI Section 4.4, which prohibits using PMCs to avoid authorization requirements or to conceal the scale of US military engagement.
ai_summary.primary_bottleneck: House of Representatives failed to hold the required impeachment vote on the PMC substitution violation by day 26 under Article III Section 10.2A and Article XVI Section 4.4.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
